Current date: **2026-06-02** → Patients aged ≥13 must have `birthdate ≤ 2013-06-02`

**Using ICD-10-CM codes** (B20 = symptomatic HIV/AIDS; Z21 = asymptomatic HIV status):
```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B20,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Z21&patient.birthdate=le2013-06-02&_include=Condition:patient

**Using SNOMED CT codes** (HIV infection, AIDS, HIV positive, HIV-1 infection):
```

```

|---|---|---|---|
| Symptomatic HIV / AIDS | ICD-10-CM | `B20` | Human immunodeficiency virus [HIV] disease |
| Asymptomatic HIV | ICD-10-CM | `Z21` | Asymptomatic HIV infection status |
| HIV Infection (broad) | SNOMED CT | `86406008` | Human immunodeficiency virus infection |
| AIDS | SNOMED CT | `62479008` | Acquired immune deficiency syndrome |
| HIV Positive status | SNOMED CT | `165816005` | HIV positive |
| HIV-1 infection | SNOMED CT | `233726005` | HIV-1 infection |

- **Symptomatic/Active:** `111880001` (Acute HIV), `86406008` (HIV infection), `B20`, `042`

All codes validated. Here is the final FHIR query:

```

---

### What this query does and why

| Layer | Codes Used | Clinical Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| **SNOMED — Asymptomatic** | `91947003` | Asymptomatic HIV infection |
| **SNOMED — Active/Detected** | `86406008`, `165816005`, `111880001`, `40780007` | HIV infection (parent), HIV detected, Acute HIV, HIV-1 infection |
| **SNOMED — AIDS** | `62479008` | Acquired immune deficiency syndrome |
| **ICD-10-CM — Symptomatic + AIDS** | `B20` | Human immunodeficiency virus [HIV] disease |
| **ICD-10-CM — Asymptomatic** | `Z21` | Asymptomatic HIV infection status |
| **ICD-9-CM — Symptomatic + AIDS** | `042` | HIV disease (legacy records) |
| **ICD-9-CM — Asymptomatic** | `V08` | Asymptomatic HIV status (legacy records) |
| **Age filter** | `patient.birthdate=le2013-06-02` | ≥ 13 years old as of today (2026-06-02) |

**Key design decisions:**
- **Three code systems** (SNOMED + ICD-10-CM + ICD-9-CM) are required because the server carries all three simultaneously on Conditions; omitting any system would undercount the cohort.
- **Z21 vs B20**: These are distinct ICD-10 codes — Z21 captures patients *known positive but currently asymptomatic*, while B20 captures active/symptomatic disease and AIDS. Both are required per the request.
- **NCQA value set `2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.120.12.1003`** (223 codes) was the authoritative reference; the additional ~200 AIDS-associated SNOMED codes (420xxx family) were tested and confirmed to add 0 new patients on this server.
- **Age cutoff**: `le2013-06-02` = born on or before June 2, 2013 → at least 13 years old today.

# HIV Population Identification: Complete FHIR Query Set

**6 queries across 3 clinical strategies** — take the union of all matching `Patient` resources (deduplicated by `Patient.id`).

---

## 🔷 Strategy 1 — HIV Diagnoses (Condition)

### Query 1 — SNOMED CT: HIV infection, AIDS, Acute HIV, HIV Positive

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|86406008,http://snomed.info/sct|62479008,http://snomed.info/sct|230180003,http://snomed.info/sct|165816005&_include=Condition:patient
```

| SNOMED Code | Clinical Meaning | Targets |
|---|---|---|
| `86406008` | Human immunodeficiency virus infection | General HIV dx |
| `62479008` | Acquired immune deficiency syndrome | AIDS |
| `230180003` | Acute HIV infection | Primary/seroconversion |
| `165816005` | HIV positive | Detected/screening confirmed |

---

### Query 2 — ICD-10-CM: HIV disease, Asymptomatic HIV, HIV-2

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B20,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Z21,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B97.35&_include=Condition:patient
```

| ICD-10-CM Code | Clinical Meaning | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `B20` | HIV disease | Symptomatic / AIDS stage |
| `Z21` | Asymptomatic HIV infection status | Engaged-in-care, pre-AIDS |
| `B97.35` | HIV-2 as cause of disease | Less common, often missed |

> ⚠️ **No `clinical-status` filter applied intentionally** — captures both active and historical HIV diagnoses to maximize population sensitivity.

---

## 🔷 Strategy 2 — ART Combination Tablet Prescriptions

### Query 3 — MedicationRequest: Active & Completed Prescriptions

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1551395,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1721603,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1721614,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1306285,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1237049&status=active,completed&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

| RxNorm CUI | Brand Name | Components | Drug Class |
|---|---|---|---|
| `1551395` | **Triumeq** | abacavir / dolutegravir / lamivudine | INSTI-based |
| `1721603` | **Genvoya** | elvitegravir / cobicistat / emtricitabine / TAF | INSTI + booster |
| `1721614` | **Odefsey** | emtricitabine / rilpivirine / TAF | NNRTI-based |
| `1306285` | **Stribild** | elvitegravir / cobicistat / emtricitabine / TDF | INSTI + booster |
| `1237049` | **Complera** | emtricitabine / rilpivirine / TDF | NNRTI-based |

> `status=active,completed` captures both currently prescribed patients **and** those recently transitioned between regimens.

---

### Query 4 — MedicationStatement: Self-Reported / Externally Documented ART

```
MedicationStatement?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1551395,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1721603,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1721614,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1306285,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1237049&status=active,intended&_include=MedicationStatement:patient
```

> Catches patients whose ART is documented outside a formal prescription workflow (e.g., care coordination notes, patient-reported history, care transitions from external providers).

## 🔷 Strategy 3 — AIDS-Defining Low CD4 Counts (Observation)

### Query 5 — CD4 Absolute Count < 200 · Unit: `{cells}/uL`

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|24467-3&value-quantity=lt200||{cells}/uL&status=final&_include=Observation:patient
```

### Query 6 — CD4 Absolute Count < 200 · Unit: `/uL` *(alternate UCUM form)*

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|24467-3&value-quantity=lt200||/uL&status=final&_include=Observation:patient
```

| Parameter | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| LOINC `24467-3` | CD3+CD4+ cells \[#/volume\] in Blood | Standard absolute CD4 LOINC |
| `lt200` | < 200 cells/µL | WHO/CDC AIDS-defining threshold |
| `status=final` | Verified results only | Excludes preliminary/amended |
| Units: `{cells}/uL` vs `/uL` | Both are valid UCUM expressions | Catches EHR unit-coding variation |

> ⚠️ **Unit sensitivity note:** If your EHR stores CD4 in `10*3/uL` (thousands), the AIDS threshold becomes `lt0.2` — run an additional check:
> ```
> Observation?code=http://loinc.org|24467-3&value-quantity=lt0.2||10*3/uL&status=final&_include=Observation:patient
> ```

## 📋 Query Summary & Union Strategy

| # | Resource | Strategy | Key Codes | Include |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `Condition` | SNOMED HIV dx | 86406008, 62479008, 230180003, 165816005 | `Condition:patient` |
| 2 | `Condition` | ICD-10-CM HIV dx | B20, Z21, B97.35 | `Condition:patient` |
| 3 | `MedicationRequest` | ART prescribed | RxNorm 5 combo tablets | `MedicationRequest:patient` |
| 4 | `MedicationStatement` | ART reported | RxNorm 5 combo tablets | `MedicationStatement:patient` |
| 5 | `Observation` | CD4 < 200 `{cells}/uL` | LOINC 24467-3 | `Observation:patient` |
| 6 | `Observation` | CD4 < 200 `/uL` | LOINC 24467-3 | `Observation:patient` |

**To build the population:**
```

## FHIR Queries: Low CD4 Counts

CD4 (T-helper cell) counts are typically reported as cells/µL. A **low CD4 count** is clinically defined as **< 500 cells/µL** (critically low/AIDS-defining is < 200 cells/µL). Relevant LOINC codes include:

- `24467-3` – CD3+CD4+ cells [#/volume] in Blood
- `19919-0` – CD3+CD4+ cells [#/volume] in Blood by Flow cytometry

---

### Queries (Low = < 500 cells/µL)

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|24467-3&value-quantity=lt500||/uL&_include=Observation:subject
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|19919-0&value-quantity=lt500||/uL&_include=Observation:subject
```

### Queries (Critically Low / AIDS-defining = < 200 cells/µL)

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|24467-3&value-quantity=lt200||/uL&_include=Observation:subject
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|19919-0&value-quantity=lt200||/uL&_include=Observation:subject
```

---

### Notes
| Threshold | Clinical Significance |
|-----------|----------------------|
| < 500 /µL | General immunosuppression / "low" |
| < 200 /µL | AIDS-defining, high OI risk |
| < 50 /µL | Severely immunocompromised |

- `_include=Observation:subject` retrieves associated **Patient** resources
- Units `/uL` = cells per microliter (UCUM); some systems may use `10*6/L` — adjust accordingly
- Add `&status=final` to restrict to finalized lab results
